title: Eva TV going OOP per RightStuf
display_title: Eva TV going OOP per RightStuf
wikitext:
[]: Eva TV going OOP, per RightStuf...             Quote Post by svenge » Tue Nov 29, 2011 7:39 pm No details about when precisely it is going OOP, but since RightStuf is pretty much the largest and most reputable anime retailer in the US, I'd take their word at it happening in the very near term. If you're on the fence about buying a set, now is the time; especially since they're selling the Platinum "thinpak" set for $29.99 + shipping currently... SOURCE

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 29, 2011 8:38 pm no way must buy second copy now! Thanks for the info. I hope it last till the new year.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Tue Nov 29, 2011 8:51 pm Well that is very cheap in comparsion to what I paid for it.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Tue Nov 29, 2011 10:25 pm :O THE END TIMES, THEY'RE A-COMIN'

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 29, 2011 10:29 pm gatotsu911 wrote: :O THE END TIMES, THEY'RE A-COMIN'

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Tue Nov 29, 2011 10:36 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: First it's the EOE website and now this. :(

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 29, 2011 10:40 pm so does this mean anything to the former ADV? "please don't say they lost the rights."

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Nov 29, 2011 11:07 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: so does this mean anything to the former AVD? "please don't say they lost the rights."

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 29, 2011 11:14 pm yeah... sorry, typing to fast. Anyway, have they lost the right to the show? here I was hoping for a blu-ray re release

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Tue Nov 29, 2011 11:34 pm I'll never know what goes in that pundit's head (he's one of the writers of the remaining anime magazine to exist in America), but move along, he's just trolling like Rudy.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Wed Nov 30, 2011 12:42 am gatotsu911 wrote: I think this calls for a song!

[]:             Quote Post by JB2448 » Wed Nov 30, 2011 3:35 am It's going out of print?! Does this also count for the Holiday Edition ? The article says that the TV series as a whole is going out of print, so I'd assume so, but I'm not sure. Does this also mean that FUNi is FINALLY trying to acquire the TV series rights so they can release it on Blu-ray, or is that wishful thinking on my part?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Nov 30, 2011 3:36 am So can I expect someone to surprise license-rescue it and put out Blu-Rays after I buy like half a dozen of these for posterity?

[]:             Quote Post by vito » Wed Nov 30, 2011 3:43 am There's still the holiday bundle, which has all the extras, while this one doesnt and neither of the two have a counter. There's also the tendency for stuff that's on sale for xmas at TRSI to be bargain binned a few months later. As for the price, it might be good or it might be bad, since ADV/Sentai has a ton of stock and I've seen stuff pricedrop twice. As for Funi getting the show, who knows, Japan might want to push Rebuild, and I'm not even sure Evangelion was even remastered in HD. To the other guy: ColonyDrop guys are fun, I hang in their IRC channel, you shouldn't overreact, stop being a pussy, it's not like you worked on the fucking show and it's your life's greatest achievement.

[]:             Quote Post by SHINOBI-03 » Wed Nov 30, 2011 4:13 am FUNimation re-release... make - it - HAPPEN!

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Wed Nov 30, 2011 5:45 am SHINOBI-03 wrote: FUNimation re-release... make - it - HAPPEN!

[]:             Quote Post by peterw5 » Wed Nov 30, 2011 6:23 am I just hope this speeds up a new North American release of End of Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Wed Nov 30, 2011 11:00 am svenge wrote: However, I would enjoy a R1 release of the Renewal version of the movies...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Nov 30, 2011 11:07 am svenge wrote: However, I would enjoy a R1 release of the Renewal version of the movies...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Nov 30, 2011 11:25 am vito wrote: To the other guy: ColonyDrop guys are fun, I hang in their IRC channel, you shouldn't overreact, stop being a pussy, it's not like you worked on the fucking show and it's your life's greatest achievement.
